title: aegilops speltoides subsp. ligustica
intro: Aegilops speltoides subsp. ligustica is a subspecies of the wild grass Aegilops speltoides, commonly known as spelt wheat. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its seed, which contains phenolic compounds and other bioactive compounds. The seed has been reported to have potential health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. Aegilops speltoides subsp. ligustica seeds are often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of various conditions.
